headline: Big Oil Flocks to Alaska in Record-Setting Petroleum Lease Sale
summary: The first lease sale in the National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska in seven years became the most successful auction in the area ever

raw.headline: Big Oil Flocks to Alaska in Record-Setting Petroleum Lease Sale

headline: U.K. says Iran unsuccessfully targeted British-American Diego Garcia base
summary: The Wall Street Journal quoted U.S. officials as saying that one missile failed in flight, while the other was intercepted.

raw.headline: U.K. says Iran unsuccessfully targeted British-American Diego Garcia base
raw.summary: The Wall Street Journal quoted U.S. officials as saying that one missile failed in flight, while the other was intercepted.

headline: ConocoPhillips Buyout Move In Otway Basin Meets Strong COP Share Momentum
summary: ConocoPhillips Australia has issued a buyout notice to 3D Energi for its 20% interest in the offshore VIC/P79 exploration permit. The move follows alleged defaults by 3D Energi under the joint operating agreement and triggers a process to determine fair market value for the stake. If ConocoPhillips proceeds with the buyout, it could obtain full control of the VIC/P79 asset in the Otway Basin. For investors tracking NYSE:COP, this development sits against a backdrop of solid recent stock...
